heading: Omitted
label: 1321, 1322 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 1321, , , which provided that certain United States citizens be granted non-quota status, was omitted on authority of which provided that this subchapter be effective until the expiration of the revised agreement between the United States and the Republic of the Philippines which occurred on .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title III, § 33160 Stat. 151section 1291(b)(1) of this titleJuly 4, 1974Section 1322, , , provided for immigration of United States citizens into the Philippines.
